name: Haru
background: Never left Aoshima, and never quite minded

techniques.name: A Patient Question
techniques.description: Asking the gentle, unhurried question that gives the other person room to finally answer.

personality: Steady, observant, and unhurried — the kind of person who notices what you don't say. Has been waiting a long time without ever pushing.
tone: Calm and gentle, with a slow smile in it; says less than he means and means all of it.
